personalInfo.name: Nguyen Ba Hoang
personalInfo.title: Backend Developer
personalInfo.location: Di An, Ho Chi Minh City
personalInfo.summary: Backend Developer with nearly 2 years of hands-on experience building and maintaining backend services using ASP.NET Core and Entity Framework Core. Experienced in RESTful API design, relational databases, and clean code principles, with a strong focus on improving backend reliability and performance. Actively expanding practical knowledge in DevOps practices such as containerization, CI/CD, and cloud-based deployment within real-world environments.

projects.name: WebOrder (WO)
projects.description: A B2B web application for managing orders, stock, deliveries, promotions and rebates for tire distribution and import operations
responsibilities: Designed and developed CRUD and publishing APIs for system notifications, including promotions, rebates, and internal announcements
Implemented flexible audience-targeting logic to distribute notifications to multiple recipient groups, such as roles, specific users, and business-defined groups
Worked with existing database views for incoming and available stock and implemented a new view to retrieve related material data via key-based relationships
Implemented a column matrix mechanism to dynamically control column visibility based on user roles

projects.name: Order Operation Management System (OOMS)
projects.description: A comprehensive web application managing orders, permits, production workflows, and deliveries for outdoor structures as part of a distributed microservices ecosystem
responsibilities: Designed and implemented REST API endpoints to validate CRM reference order updates, ensuring data integrity across the order management system
Implemented customer email update logic to prevent duplicate records and synchronize customer information across ERP, OOMS, and Customer Portal services
Designed and implemented an API endpoint to clear inactive ERP sessions, maintaining synchronization between ERP and OOMS
Implemented a daily scheduled job using Google Cloud Scheduler to automatically clear inactive ERP sessions, reducing manual operational overhead
Refactored delivery plan logging from database triggers to application-level logic to accurately track the source screen responsible for modifications
Integrated Dropbox text tags for electronic document signing using embedded DevExpress components, improving document workflow efficiency

projects.name: SISOSIT Power BI Dashboard
projects.description: Enhanced an existing Power BI dashboard to scale from single-division to multi-division usage
responsibilities: Enhanced an existing Power BI dashboard to scale from single-division to multi-division usage
Updated measures for sell-in, sell-out, and stock-in-trade metrics
Applied parameter tables to dynamically adjust measure labels based on filters

projects.name: Internship
projects.description: Internship program focused on learning backend development with ASP.NET Core and Angular
responsibilities: Learned backend development with ASP.NET Core and Angular
Built foundational REST APIs and worked with relational databases
Participated in daily stand-ups and team development activities

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Information Systems
